DISCOVER_DEVICE.description: Generic command for any device to respond to.

reset.description: Clear error states and reset system to standby.

test_watchdog.description: Test command that triggers the watchdog by blocking for 1 second.

reboot_bootloader.description: Reboots the controller into ClearCore USB bootloader mode for firmware flashing.

dump_nvm.description: Dump non-volatile memory contents to the GUI.

reset_nvm.description: Restore non-volatile memory to factory defaults.

dump_error_log.description: Dump internal error log buffer for diagnostics.

set_force_mode.description: Sets the force sensing mode (persisted to NVM).

params.help: motor_torque = use motor torque calculation (no load cell needed), load_cell = use actual load cell sensor

set_force_offset.description: Set force calibration offset and save to NVM. Routes to load cell or motor torque calibration based on current force mode.

params.help: In load_cell mode: offset in kg. In motor_torque mode: torque% intercept (default 1.04)

set_force_zero.description: Adjusts the current force calibration offset so the present force reading becomes zero.

set_force_scale.description: Set force sensor scale/linearity factor and save to NVM.

params.help: In load_cell mode: kg per raw ADC unit. In motor_torque mode: torque% per kg slope (default 0.0335)

set_strain_cal.description: Set machine strain energy compensation coefficients (force vs distance polynomial) and save to NVM.

set_polarity.description: Sets the coordinate system polarity (normal or inverted) and saves to NVM. Inverted flips home direction and all moves.

params.help: normal = standard direction, inverted = all motions and home reversed

home_on_boot.description: Sets whether the press should automatically home on startup and saves to NVM.

params.help: true = auto-home on boot, false = skip homing on boot

set_press_threshold.description: Sets the force threshold for energy/startpoint recording and saves to NVM. When force exceeds this threshold, the startpoint is recorded and energy integration begins.

params.help: Force threshold in kg (0.1 to 50.0). Default is 2.0 kg.

home.description: Homes the press axis to its zero position.

move_abs.description: Moves the press to an absolute position with speed and force limits.

params.help: In motor_torque mode: 50-2000 kg. In load_cell mode: 0.2-1000 kg.

Action when force limit reached: retract (retracts to retract position on ANY completion and returns done), hold (stops and waits), skip (ignores limit), abort (retracts ONLY if force limit hit, throws error to halt script)

move_inc.description: Moves the press by a relative distance with speed and force limits.

params.help: In motor_torque mode: 50-2000 kg. In load_cell mode: 0.2-1000 kg.

set_retract.description: Sets the retract position for the press and saves to NVM.

params.help: Optional retract speed to store for future retract commands.

retract.description: Moves the press to the preset retract position with optional speed.

cancel.description: Cancels any active move operation and returns to standby.

inject.description: Dispense a specific volume using the current cartridge ratio (ml/mm). Optionally set a force limit to detect cartridge bottom.

set_cartridge_ml_per_mm.description: Set the cartridge ratio (mL per mm of piston travel) and save to NVM.

cartridge_home.description: Home the injector against the cartridge using load cell contact detection (primary) or torque limit (backup), then move to working position.

move_to_cartridge_home.description: Move the injector to the cartridge home position.

move_to_cartridge_retract.description: Retract the injector a specified distance from cartridge home.

pinch_valve_home.description: Home a pinch valve using its hall effect sensor.

pinch_valve_home_on_boot.description: Sets whether a pinch valve should automatically home on startup and saves to NVM.

params.help: true = auto-home on boot, false = skip homing on boot

pinch_valve_open.description: Open a pinch valve (drive to home position, no torque monitoring).

pinch_valve_close.description: Close a pinch valve using torque-based detection. Optional args override NVM defaults.

set_valve_pinch_torque.description: Set the default pinch valve close torque limit and save to NVM. Shared by both valves.

set_valve_pinch_stroke.description: Set the default pinch valve close stroke distance and save to NVM. Shared by both valves.

heater_on.description: Turn the heater on with an optional setpoint. If no setpoint is provided, uses the value previously configured via set_heater_setpoint.

params.help: Target temperature in Celsius (20-200). If omitted, uses the existing setpoint.

set_heater_gains.description: Set PID gains for the heater controller and save to NVM.

set_heater_setpoint.description: Set the heater temperature setpoint and save to NVM.

set_fan_threshold.description: Set the cooling fan activation temperature threshold and save to NVM. Fan turns on when hot end temperature reaches or exceeds this value.

vacuum_on.description: Turn the vacuum pump on with an optional target pressure. If no target is provided, turns the pump on without pressure regulation.

params.help: Target pressure in PSIG (0 to -15). If omitted, pump runs without regulation.

vacuum_leak_test.description: Initiate a vacuum leak test. Uses delta and duration previously configured via set_leak_test_delta and set_leak_test_duration_s.

set_vacuum_target.description: Set the vacuum target pressure and save to NVM.

set_vacuum_timeout_s.description: Set the vacuum timeout duration and save to NVM.

set_leak_test_delta.description: Set the maximum pressure delta for vacuum leak test and save to NVM.

set_leak_test_duration_s.description: Set the leak test duration and save to NVM.
